decisions.rationale: Empty panel shells are explicitly in SET-01 scope (chrome only, no tab panel internals per decompose). SET-02+ owns panel bodies; downstream depends_on gate is satisfiable with marker shells.
Prototype settings widgets replaced by tab chrome is expected brownfield migration pattern; SET-02 will restore profile content inside ai_RNbBHYVG panel marker. Not a SET-01 AC violation.
Responsive Tailwind overrides on tab bar are minor layout delta; layout_notes allow wrap on narrow viewports. Defer to responsive polish pass.
Local hook state vs shared store naming is architecture note for future URL tab sync; SET-01 FV-3 default tab and tab switching work correctly.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Review passed at 100% coverage. SET-02+ can proceed.
